title: eryngium articulatum
intro: Eryngium articulatum, also known as Desert Holly or Articulated Sea Holly, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing swelling and pain, and its extracts have been traditionally used to treat respiratory problems and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Eryngium articulatum can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
